right: to stop sleeping and open your eyes
explanation: <Wake up> means to stop sleeping, usually in the morning.

right: to move from standing to sitting on a chair
explanation: <Sit down> means to take a seat.

right: to rise from sitting to your feet
explanation: <Stand up> means to get on your feet from a sitting position.

right: to lift something from the floor with your hand
explanation: <Pick up> means to take something from a lower surface.

right: to place clothing on your body
explanation: <Put on> means to dress yourself with a piece of clothing.

right: to remove clothing from your body
explanation: <Take off> means to remove a piece of clothing.

right: to start a machine or light by pressing a button
explanation: <Turn on> means to activate a device or light.

right: to stop a machine or light by pressing a button
explanation: <Turn off> means to deactivate a device or light.

right: to direct your eyes toward something
explanation: <Look at> means to focus your eyes on something.

right: to put words on paper with a pen
explanation: <Write down> means to record information on paper.

right: to put something in the rubbish bin
explanation: <Throw away> means to discard something you don't need.

right: to enter a room or building
explanation: <Come in> means to enter a place.
